input.headline: The best VPNs I’ve used are reduced ahead of Black Friday

raw.headline: The best VPNs I’ve used are reduced ahead of Black Friday

winner: The VPN sales were so aggressive during Black Friday that they accidentally routed all my Thanksgiving leftovers through a server in Luxembourg. Now my turkey is technically an international crime scene.

candidates.text: The VPN sales were so aggressive during Black Friday that they accidentally routed all my Thanksgiving leftovers through a server in Luxembourg. Now my turkey is technically an international crime scene.
candidates.judge_raw: {"score": 8.5, "reason": "Surprising and specific analogy with a touch of absurdity, ties the joke back to the headline cleverly."}

candidates.text: I bought a VPN during the Black Friday sale, but now I can't find my computer because it's been reduced to a size so small it's technically just a thought.
candidates.judge_raw: {"score": 8.5, "reason": "Surprising twist on 'reduced' and clever wordplay with 'thought'"}

candidates.text: What's a VPN's favorite holiday? Black *Friday*!
candidates.judge_raw: {"score": 8.5, "reason": "Puns on 'Black Friday' with a tech twist; concise, surprising, and specific to the topic."}

candidates.text: I finally found a VPN that offers "total anonymity" at a discounted price, but it’s getting hard to stay private when my bank statement is screaming about it.
candidates.judge_raw: {"score": 8.5, "reason": "Surprising twist with bank statement adds humor; concise and specific to the context of VPNs and Black Friday deals."}

candidates.text: I was excited to try the best VPNs I've ever used — until I saw they were all on sale ahead of Black Friday. Turns out, nothing says "best" like a 70% discount and a sudden loss of privacy.
candidates.judge_raw: {"score": 8.5, "reason": "Surprising twist on privacy concerns with discounts, specific and concise with natural humor"}

candidates.text: I wanted to buy a premium VPN for Black Friday, but I had to pass because it was just too "un-private" of a bargain.
candidates.judge_raw: {"score": 8.0, "reason": "Puns on 'private' and 'un-private' are clever and specific, with a natural flow and good surprise factor."}

candidates.text: I tried to use my favorite VPN before Black Friday and found out it was on sale—so I bought it, then immediately uninstalled it because I couldn’t handle the guilt of using a cheaper version.
candidates.judge_raw: {"score": 6.5, "reason": "The joke has a clever twist with the guilt of using a cheaper version, but it's slightly convoluted and lacks brevity. The specificity is there, but the humor could be more immediate and surprising."}

candidates.text: The worst VPNs I’ve used have increased since Cyber Monday—just wait till they start selling them with free cookies!
candidates.judge_raw: {"score": 6.5, "reason": "The joke is somewhat related to the headline but lacks direct connection and surprise. It introduces new elements (free cookies) that don't clearly tie back to the original statement."}

candidates.text: I tried to stream my vacation on Netflix, but my Wi-Fi said, "Sorry, you're out of data — and also out of luck.
